settings.title: Public listing
settings.text: Listings should explain the asset type, status, general value range, included items, and the expected buyer pathway.

settings.title: Buyer qualification
settings.text: Buyers confirm fit, budget, timeline, intended use, and readiness before deeper information is shared.

settings.title: Review pathway
settings.text: Qualified buyers can be directed to review packs, deposits, seller conversations, or structured follow-up.

settings.heading: How the asset sales process works
settings.text: Understand how business asset listings are presented, how buyer interest is qualified, and how information is shared in stages.

settings.title: Confidentiality Process
settings.description: Learn how information access is handled.

settings.heading: Read before requesting listing details
settings.text: These pages explain buyer review, information packs, confidentiality, and terms for asset sale enquiries.
